content: Firebase Firestore modular: imports from 'firebase/firestore': getFirestore, doc, collection, getDoc, setDoc, updateDoc, addDoc, query, getDocs. db = getFirestore(app). Document reference: doc(db, 'users', userId). setDoc creates/overwrites entire document. updateDoc merges partial fields without overwriting others. getDoc returns DocumentSnapshot; snapshot.exists() to check; snapshot.data() to get object. Firestore users collection schema: { name, targetExam, targetDate, startingPlant, streak, zenPoints, lastActive, createdAt, redeemedItems }.
